feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Upload Document Reference Information via DTW RDR21
entry.content:
hi,
i need tu upload via DTW the table RDR21.
In post 11869854 i read that in 2016 this is not available in the DTW at this stage.
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/upload-document-reference-information-via-dtw/qaq-p/11869854

Is the function available now?
DTW fails with error "Update Failed Can not find this object in B1 Application-defined or object-defined error.65171 "

I'm at SAP BUSINESS ONE 10.0 FP2405. DTW version 10.0.251.0.
Thanks a lot.

Chiara

entry.title: SAP B1 Client Install problem
entry.content:
hello

We have a problem installing SAP B1 Client (10.250) on a new PC with Win 11. client does not want to start, aborts..

the new PC is visible in the domain, in the network and can access the server folder.

We get the following message:

1024/111402.322:ERROR:command_buffer_proxy_impl.cc(131)] ContextResult::kTransientFailure: Failed to send GpuControl.CreateCommandBuffer.

1024/111402.329:ERROR:gpu_process_host.cc(1002)] GPU process exited unexpectedly: exit_code=-2147483645

1024/111521.328:ERROR:command_buffer_proxy_impl.cc(131)] ContextResult::kTransientFailure: Failed to send GpuControl.CreateCommandBuffer.

1024/111521.378:ERROR:cert_verify_proc_builtin.cc(878)] CertVerifyProcBuiltin for vmXXXX.poxxx.local (Servername) failed:

----- Certificate i=0 (CN=VMXXX,OU=B1,O=SAP,C=CN) -----

ERROR: No matching issuer found

all old PCs communicate with the server (win 2016) and SAP without problems.

 There seems to be a problem with certificates, but we don't understand which one. maybe someone knows the problem

entry.title: Inventory Audit Report with Distribution Rule
entry.content:
Hi to all.

I have several clients where we use the inventory audit report to validate the purchase account, closing inventories, cost of goods sold and net inventory change. The thing is, we'll also need to have the Distr. Rule and the report that the system produces, doesn't have the possibility of adding this field.

Can someone please help me create a query with the following structure:

Item No. // Description // System Date // Posting Date // Document // Whse // Distr. Rule // Quantity // Cost // Trans. Value // Cumulative Qty // Cumulative Value

It's also important that we can filter by date, since our analysis is conducted every month.

I'm guessing that this query is quite complex to make from scratch, as it requires searching through multiple documents.

Thank you in advance.

Translated with DeepL.com (free version)

entry.title: Intermittent Error when PATCH'ing UDF on Master Data with Service Layer
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm having some difficulty trying to update an UDF in the UnitOfMeasurement Master Data.

We're using SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.260) SP 2408 (64-bit).

I'm trying to update the UnitOfMeasurements entities with Service Layer, but intermittently I receive an error message in return:

Property 'U_r_ProductDescription' of 'UnitOfMeasurement' is invalid

In this case, I'm updating around 20 entities and about half are updated and half are not (receiving the error message).

Then, I get the 10 that got the error and try again, then some are updated, and some get the same error.

If I continue this for around 4 times, I get all updated.

What could possibly be the problem?

entry.title: SAP B1 blocking query
entry.content:
Hi experts,

 

May I ask why is my query blockings in SAP B1 is not working if I include @OpenAmount variable in my condition.

the query will posted below:

 

IF (@object_type = '1470000113' AND  @transaction_type IN ('C', 'L'))
BEGIN 
DECLARE @OpenAmount NUMERIC (20,6) 
,@Footer nvarchar (32),@cancelled nvarchar (1)
 
SELECT @Footer = A.U_Reason , @Canceled = A.CANCELED, @OpenAmount = SUM (B.OpenSum)
FROM OPRQ a INNER JOIN PRQ1 B ON A.Docentry = B. Docentry 
WHERE A.DocEntry = @List_of_cols_val_tab_del --AND ISNULL(A.U_Reason,'') = '' --AND  A.CANCELED = 'N'
AND a.DataSource <> 'O' 
 
GROUP BY A.U_Reason, A.CANCELED, B.OpenSum
 
 
IF  @Footer IS NULL AND @OpenAmount >= 1  // (This variable openamount is not read in SAP B1)
BEGIN 
SET  @error =  -100031
SET  @error_message=N'Provide reason for Closing/Cancelling then Click Update first'
END 
END
 
 
Thank you

entry.title: Multiplication of two UDF into SAP B1
entry.content:
Hi ,

UDF1 row level and UDF2 row level into RDR1 screen.

Need to multiplication of both and show into third UDF into sales order screen without script.

How can it do?

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: sap b1 archive wizard can't detect all the users have logged out or not
entry.content:
Hello all,

It is really annoying when archiving wizard shows warning like this picture :

what a bad erp product

 

Others users are currently connected to the database meanwhile in the access log, there is only one user logged in.. what kind of alert it is...

I don't understand why the the developer or programmer that developed the archive wizard function could not understand this erp product flows. He/She might be sleepy or not skillful...

The solution for me to solve this is to detach the db which it means that I must restart the archive wizard. what a f00l developer of sap b1

Rgds,

entry.title: HDBLCM platform lifecycle management functionality is limited
entry.content:
Hi All

Can we ignore this HDBLCM installation alert?  I cant find any relevant SAP Note.

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: SAP Certification
entry.content: Hi Community I'm preparing get certified  in November does anyone have the question dump that will help me prepare for the SAP Business once associate certification

entry.title: Closing Line of StockTransferRequest with DIAPI
entry.content:
Hello,

I can't find a possibility to close Lines in StockTransferRequest with DIAPI SAP Business One #

Does someone know, how to close the lines?

Regards

Marco

entry.title: Crystal Report issue after Deployment in SAP B1 client
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

We are deploying the Crystal Report in our SAP B1 client but we are getting the below Error.

Please Suggest your solution on this, It will be great Help.

 

We are getting beblow Error message :

 

See the end of this message for details on invoking
just-in-time (JIT) debugging instead of this dialog box.

************** Exception Text **************
System.ArgumentException: Parameter is not valid.
at System.Drawing.Bitmap..ctor(Stream stream)
at CrystalDecisions.Shared.PageRender.draw_ImageInstance(ImageObjectInstance imageInst, Graphics g)
at CrystalDecisions.Shared.PageRender.draw_ReportObjectInstance(ReportObjectInstance instance, Graphics g, Rectangle clipRect)
at CrystalDecisions.Shared.PageRender.draw_SectionInstance(SectionInstance section, Graphics g, Rectangle clipRect)
at CrystalDecisions.Shared.PageRender.Render(PageObject page, Graphics g, Graphics device_g)
at CrystalDecisions.Windows.Forms.PageControl.OnPaint(PaintEventArgs e)
at System.Windows.Forms.Control.PaintWithErrorHandling(PaintEventArgs e, Int16 layer)
at System.Windows.Forms.Control.WmPaint(Message& m)
at System.Windows.Forms.Control.WndProc(Message& m)
at System.Windows.Forms.UserControl.WndProc(Message& m)
at CrystalDecisions.Windows.Forms.PageControl.WndProc(Message& m)
at System.Windows.Forms.NativeWindow.Callback(IntPtr hWnd, Int32 msg, IntPtr wparam, IntPtr lparam)


************** Loaded Assemblies **************
mscorlib
Assembly Version: 4.0.0.0
Win32 Version: 4.8.4110.0 built by: NET48REL1LAST_B
CodeBase: file:///C:/Windows/Microsoft.NET/Framework64/v4.0.30319/mscorlib.dll
----------------------------------------
B1_WebBridge
Assembly Version: 10.0.251.0
Win32 Version: 10.00.251
CodeBase: file:///C:/Program%20Files/SAP/SAP%20Business%20One/B1_WebBridge.DLL
----------------------------------------
log4net
Assembly Version: 2.0.16.0
Win32 Version: 2.0.16.0
CodeBase: file:///C:/Program%20Files/SAP/SAP%20Business%20One/log4net.DLL
----------------------------------------
System.Configuration
Assembly Version: 4.0.0.0
Win32 Version: 4.8.3761.0 built by: NET48REL1
CodeBase: file:///C:/Windows/Microsoft.Net/assembly/GAC_MSIL/System.Configuration/v4.0_4.0.0.0__b03f5f7f11d50a3a/System.Configuration.dll
----------------------------------------
System
Assembly Version: 4.0.0.0
Win32 Version: 4.8.4110.0 built by: NET48REL1LAST_B
CodeBase: file:///C:/Windows/Microsoft.Net/assembly/GAC_MSIL/System/v4.0_4.0.0.0__b77a5c561934e089/System.dll

************** JIT Debugging **************
To enable just-in-time (JIT) debugging, the .config file for this
application or computer (machine.config) must have the
jitDebugging value set in the system.windows.forms section.
The application must also be compiled with debugging
enabled.

For example:

<configuration>
<system.windows.forms jitDebugging="true" />
</configuration>

When JIT debugging is enabled, any unhandled exception
will be sent to the JIT debugger registered on the computer
rather than be handled by this dialog box.

entry.title: SAP B1 Very Slow on New laptop
entry.content:
Good Day, I have a new laptop that i just installed SAP Business One on and I have a unique issue. When loading SAP it is incredibly slow to load up. Once I log in and try to open the Sales Open Item list for example, it will take many minutes to open. Overall SAP is very slow on this machine only. Connecting to LAN resolves the issue.

We are running SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.240) SP 2402 (Security) HOTFIX1 (64-bit)

I have completed these and more things trying to resolve:

-updated and reset the BIOS settings to factory.

-updated all Lenovo updates for this model.

-ran windows updates and it is all updated.

- ran performance tests.

- updated the WiFI drivers to the Intel Driver with no change

-Uninstalled and re-installed SAP and Drivers without any virus protection

-Made sure the Windows Performance setting were set to best performance

-set the Wifi to the same channel as my personal laptop

 

I attached the log files from this mornings test. Any help is appreciated. Thank you

entry.title: No Price found for the Item warning comes when selecting an article from CCO
entry.content:
Dear Experts ,

Hope all are well and fine as usual ...!

Kindly note that for a new requirement testing we have created an Item in SAP Business One (V10 2202) as below ,

Then after getting some stocks in to the system and doing full article synchronization we were tried to sell the same in Sap Customer Checkout (V2.0 FP20 PL03)  but giving below warning and manually price need to be given ,

So Does any one can advise why is this happening and not grabbing the price we have already setup in SAP Business One.

In addition to that is there any other way to sell in different UOM's from Sap Customer Checkout than  assigning different barcodes for each UOM with in SAP Business One because in change UOM option it shows only the base UOM to be selected . Really grateful if some one can support . 

Thanks in advance .

entry.title: BUDGET ERROR Invalid amounts in rows
entry.content:
Hi,

When I want to upload the budget using DTW templates, I receive the error "Invalid amounts in rows." I am using two templates: OBGT and BGT1. In my OBGT template, there are the following columns:

 

NumeratorTotalAnnualBudgetDebitSysTotalAnnualBudgetDebitLocTotalAnnualBudgetCreditSysTotalAnnualBudgetCreditLocDivisionCodeAccountCodeBudgetScenario
SCNCounterDebSTotalDebLTotalCredSTotalCredLTotalBgdCodeAcctCodeInstance

In my BGT1 template, there are these columns:

 

ParentKeyLineNumRowDetailsBudgetSysTotDebitBudgetTotCreditBudgetSysTotCreditBudgetTotDebit
NumeratorLineNumLineMemoDebSTotalDebLTotalCredSTotalCredLTotal

When I fill in the currency columns and load the templates, I do not encounter an error. However, when I fill in the local currency columns and load them, I receive the "Invalid amounts in rows" error. In the OBGT template, if I fill in the local currency and the system currency columns are filled, I do not get an error. But when I fill in the local currency in the rows as well, I still receive the same error. Please help me!

entry.title: The total amount is not automatically calculated when triggered by a price change
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Is there a setting that will prevent the total price from changing when the price is changed?

 

--Scenario

The price of the purchase order which is added previously is changed.

 

--Expected behavior:

Total Amount is re-calculated automatically when the price is changed.

 

--Actual behavior:

Total Amount is not re-calculated.

 

Thank you and Best Regards,

Satoshi

entry.title: How to resolve the SAP B1 Schema Export Failing with Backup Exit Code 139?
entry.content:
Hello,

I am using an hourly export of the B1 Schema from the System Landscape Directory. I am backing up to an NFS share on another server. The NFS share has FULL CONTROL rights to EVERYONE.

It was working fine till now but yesterday, the schema exports started failing with the backup exit code 139. Here are the log entries:

run_backup.sh(9497) 241101-103736: Instance:XXXX Schema:"YYYY" Pid file /var/log/SAPBusinessOne/BackupService/logs/XXXX/YYYY.pid
run_backup.sh(9497) 241101-103736: Instance:XXXX Schema:"YYYY" Begin: Timestamp:241101_103736 User:SYSTEM Password:**** BackupPath:/mnt/schema-backup/XXXX LogFile:/var/log/SAPBusinessOne/BackupService/logs/XXXX/YYYY.log WorkingPath:/tmp/backup_service
run_backup.sh(9497) 241101-103736: Instance:XXXX Schema:"YYYY" GUID:
run_backup.sh(9497) 241101-103736: Instance:XXXX Schema:"YYYY" /usr/sap/SAPBusinessOne/ServerTools/Backup/bin/BackupUtility backup -dbserver 'XXXX' -dbuser 'SYSTEM' -dbpassword:secure:env '****' -database 'YYYY' -location '/mnt/schema-backup/XXXX' -t '/tmp/backup_service' -compress
run_backup.sh(9497) 241101-103738: Instance:XXXX Schema:"YYYY" Finish: Timestamp:241101_103736 BackupExitCode:139

 

Please help me to resolve this as schema exports are very important for us.

entry.title: How to handle wastage in production process of SAP Business One?
entry.content:
Hello, I would like your advice on the subject of waste in production. What are the ways to deal with Waste within SAP B1?

For example, I have a BOM that contains a final product, crispy, 98 pieces, produced from 20 kg of chicken breast. On some days, the production is like 100 pieces from the same amount of raw materials, and at other times, the production is 95 pieces from 24 kg of chicken breast. How do I deal with this?

entry.title: How do I update a case incorrect Tax Code (CRD1)
entry.content:
At some point 467 of our ship-to addresses have gotten incorrect TaxCode Values of "EX" written to them when the proper value is "Ex" (for Exempt). Since updating to SAP10 we can no longer update those BP records. I have attempted to rectify the issues using the Import from Excel and using DTW. 

Regardless of methodology I get essentially the same error

(Import From Excel)
[Business Partners - Addresses - Tax Code][line: 2] , 'Linked value EX does not exist' - Row Number 1

(DTW)
1 Update Failed C0002408 [CRD1.TaxCode][line: 1] , 'Linked value EX does not exist' [CRD1.TaxCode][line: 1] , 'Linked value EX does not exist'65171

Please note that I have been very careful that my files use Ex which makes this error quite aggravating as at some points it's case sensitive and at others clearly not. 

Do I have any recourse other than updating these all by hand?

entry.title: Document Date (TaxDate) Should not update by user in posted document
entry.content:
Team,

Due to audit enquiry, In all transaction documents like PO, GRPO, AP Invoice, Etc the Document Date (Tax Date) should not be update by the user in posted document. Once the document added or posted by the user, The Document date (TaxDate) should not be update at any reasons. How can we block this filed. Is it possible? If Possible how?

Waiting For your valuable reply.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: How to query Users ad their own Authorization Groups
entry.content:
SELECT U.USERID , U.USER_CODE, U.U_NAME, G.GROUPID, G.GROUPNAME
FROM OUSR U
LEFT JOIN USR7 U7 ON U7.UserId = U.USERID
LEFT JOIN OUGR G ON U7.GROUPID = G.GROUPID AND G.GroupType = 'A'
